title: python-kdcproxy security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.0.0-19]
- Use DNS discovery for declared realms only (CVE-2025-59088)
  Resolves: RHEL-122777
- Fix DoS vulnerability based on unbounded TCP buffering (CVE-2025-59089)
  Resolves: RHEL-122776
full_text:
[1.0.0-19]
- Use DNS discovery for declared realms only (CVE-2025-59088)
  Resolves: RHEL-122777
- Fix DoS vulnerability based on unbounded TCP buffering (CVE-2025-59089)
  Resolves: RHEL-122776

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21142.html
